purpose: Reusable profile context for HR bios, stakeholder introductions, and leadership communications.

sources.notes: Primary structured source for Abivax interview-positioning and ERP-relevant career evidence.

profile.name: Mike Markman
headlineEvidence: Co-designed and implemented SAP as a global financial system of record at KKR (2010-2013).
Built NetSuite-formatted integration workflows in a production operating platform context (Laurel AG, 2024).
Architected enterprise cloud data platforms integrating SAP/PeopleSoft/Workday/Salesforce at IQVIA (2022-2024).
Led a 400-person global financial shared services organization and transformation programs.
Delivered major close-cycle, reporting, and cost-efficiency improvements across finance operations.
industryContext: Life sciences and healthcare operating context
Cross-border finance and operating model alignment
leadershipStyle: Cross-functional alignment across Finance, IT, and Operations

hrBioTemplates.short: Mike Markman is Abivax's VP, Global ERP Lead, responsible for leading the end-to-end ERP transformation to a unified NetSuite platform across US and France operations.
hrBioTemplates.medium: Mike Markman is Abivax's VP, Global ERP Lead, responsible for the company's ERP transformation from vendor selection through implementation and go-live. He brings 20+ years of experience in ERP, finance operations, and enterprise transformation, including SAP system-of-record implementation, NetSuite integration work, and leadership of global shared-services and analytics programs.
hrBioTemplates.long: Mike Markman is Abivax's VP, Global ERP Lead, responsible for the full ERP program lifecycle from selection through go-live and stabilization. He brings 20+ years of experience leading finance and systems transformations, including co-designing SAP as a global financial system of record, building NetSuite integration workflows, and architecting enterprise data platforms that integrate multiple ERP and operational systems. His background combines financial controls rigor, cross-functional program leadership, and practical execution across Finance, IT, and Operations.

do: Use concrete implementation evidence instead of generic leadership claims.
Anchor bios to Abivax outcomes: unified platform, controls strengthening, operating model readiness.
Adapt length based on audience: HR announcement, executive agenda, board materials.
avoid: Inflating unverified metrics not tied to documented source files.
Over-indexing on non-Abivax examples without explaining relevance.
Mixing Board and Audit Committee timelines in a single sentence.
